ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "time_of_creation" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., published, draft, archived) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "time_of_creation" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "parent_comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment the user interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., upvote, downvote, flag) */,
  "time_of_interaction" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approve, reject, flag) */,
  "time_of_action" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment related to the notification */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., upvote, comment, moderation) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "time_of_notification" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the comment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "time_of_report" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, reviewed, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the comment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag */,
  "time_of_flag" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flag (e.g., pending, reviewed, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being analyzed */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score for the comment */,
  "time_of_analysis" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
